settings.title: Ten Years on the High Street
settings.excerpt: This month marks a decade since we first opened our doors, and we want to say thank you.
settings.body:
Ten years ago we fitted out a tired old shop unit, hung the Brightside sign, and waited nervously for our first patient. That patient still comes in, and so do many of the families who trusted us in those early days.

A lot has changed since then. We have grown the team, added chairs, and seen children we first met as toddlers come back as teenagers. What has not changed is the plan we started with: treat people the way we would want to be treated.

How we are marking it

To mark the anniversary we are running free oral health checks for local schoolchildren throughout May. No treatment, no pressure, just a friendly look and some honest advice for parents.

We are also doing a few other things this month to give something back:

  • Donating a portion of this month's whitening fees to the community dental fund.
  • Hosting an open afternoon for anyone curious about the practice.
  • Saying a proper thank you to the patients who started with us in year one.

The community dental fund helps people who cannot otherwise afford care, and it is a cause close to us. Good dental care should not depend on what you earn.

Thank you

None of this happens without the people who walk through the door. Thank you for ten years of trust, for the referrals, and for sticking with us through a move and a refit. We are not going anywhere.
